title: rubus roseus var. rosiflorus
intro: Rubus roseus var. rosiflorus, also known as the rose-leaved raspberry or Himalayan raspberry, is a variant of the Rubus roseus plant, a species of flowering raspberry native to the Himalayas. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus roseus var. rosiflorus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be consumed fresh or dried to reap its health benefits.
